column1: # Resend `send.<domain>` email-auth DNS records for Cloudflare (GOL-580).
# TAB-separated: zone <TAB> type <TAB> name <TAB> content <TAB> priority
# Copy to scripts/resend-records.tsv, fill the TODO_FROM_RESEND values from the
# Resend dashboard (Domains -> <domain> -> DNS records), then run:
# Deterministic rows (SPF/DMARC) are pre-filled and identical across domains.
# DKIM CNAME target and the feedback-smtp AWS region are Resend-generated per
# domain — Resend is the source of truth; transcribe EXACTLY what it shows.
#  and one DKIM CNAME `resend._domainkey` -> <hash>.dkim.amazonses.com. If Resend
#  shows more/different rows for a domain, add/adjust rows to match it exactly.)
# NOTE: the storefront From must live on a Resend-verified domain. This scope
# verifies the send.<domain> SUBDOMAIN, so the From should be
# notifications@send.<domain> (or verify the apex instead). See the runbook +
# the handback note to Ada re: grove-odoo-modules#25 res.company.email.
